summary: Iteration 54: Threshold Simulator Panel tests completed. All 16 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: Threshold Simulator panel with SIMULATION ONLY badge, preset buttons (Conservative/Balanced/Aggressive), 5 sliders with strikethrough for modified values, Run Simulation button, comparison cards showing Exit Candidates/Good Exits/Bad Exits/Portfolio PnL, per-reason performance cards, new/removed exits sections, decision quality assessment. CRITICAL: Verified simulation does NOT modify live lifecycle evaluations.

backend_api_tests: Simulate returns all required fields (sim_thresholds, live_thresholds, total_evaluated, live_candidates, sim_candidates, delta_candidates, per_reason, decision_quality, comparison) - PASS
sim_thresholds contains all 5 threshold values and accepts custom params - PASS
live_thresholds contains all 5 threshold values for comparison - PASS
per_reason is valid dict with correct structure when data exists - PASS
per_reason delta = sim_count - live_count for each reason - PASS
decision_quality is valid dict with correct structure when data exists - PASS
decision_quality percentages add up correctly - PASS
comparison is valid dict with new_exits and removed_exits arrays - PASS
Aggressive thresholds (1.5x) produce more exit candidates than default (2.0x) - PASS
Conservative thresholds (3.0x) produce fewer exit candidates than default (2.0x) - PASS
CRITICAL: Simulation does NOT modify live lifecycle evaluations - PASS
CRITICAL: Simulation does NOT affect exit-candidates endpoint - PASS
Regression: positions/by-strategy weather positions still have lifecycle data - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Threshold Simulator panel renders with data-testid='threshold-simulator' - PASS
SIMULATION ONLY badge visible in cyan - PASS
Presets section with Conservative/Balanced/Aggressive buttons - PASS
All 5 slider components present (Profit Capture, Max Negative Edge, Edge Decay, Time Threshold, Time Min Edge) - PASS
Slider values show strikethrough for live values when modified - PASS
Run Simulation button triggers API call - PASS
Comparison cards show Exit Candidates with delta - PASS
Per-Reason Performance section shows live vs sim counts with delta - PASS
New Exits section shows position-level detail - PASS
Decision Quality Assessment shows percentages and verdict - PASS
Reset to Live button appears when thresholds modified - PASS
Previous lifecycle features still work (summary cards, reason distribution, sold vs held) - PASS

details: POST endpoint accepts JSON body with custom threshold params
Returns sim_thresholds and live_thresholds for comparison
Returns per_reason breakdown with sim_count, live_count, delta, good_exits, bad_exits
Returns decision_quality with total_sim_exits, good_exits, bad_exits, good_exit_pct, bad_exit_pct
Returns comparison with new_exits and removed_exits arrays
Aggressive (1.5x profit) produces more candidates than default
Conservative (3.0x profit) produces fewer candidates than default
Simulation is read-only - does not modify live state
Simulator panel at bottom of Lifecycle tab
SIMULATION ONLY badge in cyan color
3 preset buttons: Conservative, Balanced, Aggressive
5 sliders with live value strikethrough when modified
Run Simulation button calls POST /api/positions/weather/lifecycle/simulate
Results display: comparison cards, per-reason, decision quality, new/removed exits
Reset to Live button resets sliders
GET lifecycle BEFORE simulation captured 54 evaluations with 2 exit candidates
POST simulate with extreme thresholds (profit_capture=0.5) ran successfully
GET lifecycle AFTER simulation shows same 54 evaluations with 2 exit candidates
Mode unchanged (tag_only), exit_reason unchanged, is_exit_candidate unchanged
exit-candidates endpoint returns same count before and after simulation

simulate_aggressive.result: More exit candidates due to lower threshold

simulate_conservative.result: Fewer exit candidates due to higher threshold

test_credentials: None required - paper mode, no auth
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (54 open weather positions, 2 exit candidates with 5.52x avg profit multiple)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 verified Threshold Simulator Panel in the Lifecycle Dashboard tab. Key findings: (1) POST /api/positions/weather/lifecycle/simulate endpoint accepts custom thresholds and returns simulation results with all required fields. (2) Currently 54 positions evaluated with 2 live exit candidates (both profit_capture at ~5.52x avg). (3) Aggressive preset (1.5x) produces more candidates, Conservative preset (3.0x) produces fewer - as expected. (4) CRITICAL: Simulation is read-only and does NOT modify live lifecycle evaluations. (5) Frontend shows sliders with strikethrough for live values when modified, preset buttons work, results show comparison cards with delta. (6) Previous lifecycle features still work (summary cards, reason distribution, sold vs held table). (7) The simulator panel is at the bottom of the Lifecycle tab with data-testid='threshold-simulator'.
